title: Bonney and Luffy Strike Back
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Emeth, Luffy, Unknown person #12 as The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "A robot with Haki!!! and how did that make them vanish?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We did it!!! We landed safely!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm fine... but atlas and Edison!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I have to know that the

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna gather my most powerful haki...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're bound to live much longer than me: I'm not gonna always be around to help.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're going to be in mortal danger...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or someone you want to save will be!! When that happens...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So when the time is at hand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You'll still be there to help???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right!! Whenever it happens, I'll be saving you from here in the past!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hehe... that makes me happy! Thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now it doesn't matter if you're dead, it will be like you are still with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey! That's not gonna happen for ages!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I hope... I don't get lonely... Hehe...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Escape through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
